issues.rationale: Active fund loss vulnerability via re-entrancy. Affects all deployed gardens with ETH balances. Requires immediate hotfix and potential pause.
Complete authentication failure blocking all users. No workaround exists. Regression from recent merge.
Garden creation broken for a subset of cases (>5 actions). Workaround exists (create with fewer actions, add more later). Not a total blocker.
Cosmetic typo in a single label. No functional impact. Fix is a one-line i18n string change.
Feature request. System theme following already works. Manual toggle is a nice-to-have with no current user complaints.
Dependency cleanup. No user-facing impact. Bundle size reduction is beneficial but not urgent. Can be scheduled for a maintenance sprint.
Significant UX degradation for users in active communities with many gardens. Not a crash but renders the app unusable during the freeze window.
Contributor onboarding improvement. No user-facing impact. Important but not time-sensitive.
Test coverage gap in critical infrastructure. No immediate risk since the code works in production, but increases risk for future changes to retry logic.
Dependency update with no breaking changes. Minor improvements. Can be bundled with other maintenance work.
